title: FAA and federal workers forced to install $1.4 million White House app containing Russian-built Elfsight code onto government-issued mobile devices
summary: Olivia Wales, a White House spokeswoman, said the app "does not request or collect any user locations" and called all its information "safe and secure." A White House official later said Elfsight's only remaining…
